org.apache.juneau.rest.server.RestContext.ContextKind

Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API

  • Uses of RestContext.ContextKind in org.apache.juneau.rest.server

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that implement RestContext.ContextKind
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Child
    A routed child resource (mounted via @Rest(children)); isolated resolution.
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Mixin
    A per-mixin sub-context (composed via Rest.mixins()/Rest.mixinDefs()); inherits the host chain.
    static final record 
    RestContext.ContextKind.Root
    A top-level (host) resource, mock context, or servlet-mounted resource.
    Fields in org.apache.juneau.rest.server declared as RestContext.ContextKind
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final RestContext.ContextKind
    RestContext.ContextKind.CHILD
    Shared RestContext.ContextKind.Child singleton (the path override travels in RestContext.Args.path(), not here).
    protected final RestContext.ContextKind
    RestContext.contextKind
    The build-time kind of this context (never null).
    static final RestContext.ContextKind
    RestContext.ContextKind.ROOT
    Shared RestContext.ContextKind.Root singleton (the common case).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server that return RestContext.ContextKind
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RestContext.ContextKind
    RestContext.Args.kind()
    Returns the value of the kind record component.

    Description
     
    Args(Class<?> resourceClass, RestContext parentContext, jakarta.servlet.ServletConfig servletConfig, Supplier<?> resource, String path, Consumer<WritableBeanStore> beanStoreConfigurer, BeanStore overridingParent, String[] paths, RestContext.ContextKind kind)
